sub_goals.sub_goal: Exercise every edge_case_testing-verifier assertion from sections 1-4 against the integrated artifact under production fidelity; confirm no crash and no blank screen in any failure path.

acceptance_verification.evidence: All 8 edge_case_testing assertions from sections 1-4 (S1.A4, S2.A2, S2.A4, S2.A5, S3.A1, S3.A4, S4.A3, S4.A4) exercised against the integrated artifact's unmodified code; all pass.
Geolocation-denied, Overpass-failure, Overpass-timeout, offline, and empty-result conditions all degrade gracefully — clear human-readable message, no crash, no blank screen.
Controlled-coordinate tests confirm the minimum great-circle distance store is selected as the single result.
